𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰: Yes, babes, Chuuya is back and more traumatized than ever! :) Finally, some more delicious angst. Got a bit carried away with the greeting, sorry! Regardless, this request was fun.

Enjoy <3

I love Chuuya so much *proceeds to make him suffer*

This is actually even more angsty, because not only is his lover in danger, but he's also getting flashbacks (Stormbringer readers know what's up).

𝑇ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑚𝑎𝑑𝑒 𝑏𝑦 @𝐷𝑟_𝑃3𝑃𝑍 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝐴𝐼. 𝐴𝑛𝑦 𝑟𝑒𝑢𝑝𝑙𝑜𝑎𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑓 𝑚𝑦 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝑖𝑡𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓 𝑜𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑦 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑠𝑖𝑡𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝑠𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑎𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑐𝑒𝑠 𝑖𝑠 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑑.
